events.name: Los Angeles Lakers at Charlotte Hornets

headlines.description: — Luka Doncic had 38 points, Rui Hachimura scored 13 of his 21 points in a pivotal third quarter and the Los Angeles Lakers pulled away in the second half to beat the Charlotte Hornets 121-111 on Monday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Doncic scores 38 points as Lakers use strong third quarter to earn 6th win in last 7 games

headlines.description: — Cade Cunningham scored a career-high 46 points on a whopping 45 shots, Daniss Jenkins made the tying 3-pointer to force overtime and the Detroit Pistons rallied to beat the Washington Wizards 137-135 on Monday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cunningham scores 46 points, rallies Pistons to a 137-135 victory over the Wizards in overtime

events.name: Portland Trail Blazers at Orlando Magic

headlines.description: — Desmond Bane hit a 3-pointer at the buzzer to give the Orlando Magic a 115-112 win over the Portland Trail Blazers on Monday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bane's 3-pointer at the buzzer lifts the Magic to a 115-112 win over the Trail Blazers

headlines.description: — Andrew Wiggins made an alley-oop dunk at the buzzer in overtime, and the Miami Heat beat the Cleveland Cavaliers 140-138 in a wild back-and-forth game Monday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Andrew Wiggins' alley-oop dunk at OT buzzer gives Heat a 140-138 win over the Cavaliers

events.name: San Antonio Spurs at Chicago Bulls

headlines.description: — Victor Wembanyama scored 18 of his 38 points in the fourth quarter, and the San Antonio Spurs beat the Chicago Bulls 121-117 on Monday night for their third consecutive win.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wembanyama scores 38 points as the Spurs rally past the Bulls for a 121-117 victory

events.name: New Orleans Pelicans at Phoenix Suns

headlines.description: — Grayson Allen made a franchise-record 10 3-pointers and scored a career-high 42 points, leading the Phoenix Suns to a 121-98 victory over the New Orleans Pelicans on Monday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Grayson Allen makes Suns-record 10 3-pointers, scores 42 points in 121-98 victory over Pelicans

headlines.description: — Anthony Edwards had 35 points and six assists as the Timberwolves beat the Jazz 120-113 on Monday night for Minnesota's second win over Utah in four days.

headlines.description: — Vit Krejci scored a career-high 28 points off the bench, Kristaps Porzingis added 20 and the Atlanta Hawks opened a four-game road trip with a 105-102 victory over the Los Angeles Clippers on Monday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Krejci scores career-high 28 points as Hawks send Clippers to fifth straight loss, 105-102
